positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, playful woodland creatures (foxes, deer, rabbits) mingling with oversized leaves, and gently flowing streams. The style should be vector-art influenced illustration, reminiscent of modern nature guides, with clean lines, bold color blocking, and a strong, cheerful contrast between deep forest shadows and vibrant neon glows. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for repeating apparel print. Cinematic, high contrast, flat digital illustration, UHD, sticker book quality, octane render, minimal shading, symmetry.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, logo, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, dark, realistic photograph, bokeh, low detail
